name: Aranui Cruises
message: Aranui Cruises is the oldest cruise operator in French Polynesia, having been founded 35 years ago. The company has a ship made to order ship "Aranui 5" designed for VIP level cruise holidays. The American office of the company is located at 2028 El Camino Real So Te B, San Mateo, California, 94403, United States
